title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert Oracle database schemas and data types to PostgreSQL equivalents. The tutorial covers mapping types like VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE while preserving precision and internationalization support.
